message:
feat(engine): expand 15 source modules and refine 6 test suites

Source module expansions (15 modules):
- budget_propagation_contract, budgeted_synthesis_engine,
  causal_intervention_dag, entropic_policy_morphing,
  esm_cjs_parity_evidence, frankenlab_harness_migration,
  metadata_substrate_optimized, module_resolver, object_model,
  persistent_cache_contract, react_repro_triage,
  resource_certificate_governance, semantic_cover_schema,
  ts_resolution_manifest, versioned_rewrite_pack

Test refinements (6 files):
- benchmark_behavior_equivalence_integration: expanded
- budgeted_synthesis_engine_enrichment_integration: expanded
- exception_semantics_conformance: expanded
- ifc_artifacts_enrichment_integration: expanded
- module_resolver: refactored (+53/-53)
- promise_model_enrichment2_integration: +222 lines

Beads tracker: sync issue state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
